features: 4 pack of California Scents Car Scents Coronado Cherry Car Air Fresheners
Discreet car air freshener can fits under seats and in cupholders
Cherry scented air freshener releases immediate scent to quickly freshen your space
Car freshener features an adjustable lid to control fragrance output
Air freshener for cars comes in a sealed can to maintain fragrance
Great fresh cherry fragrance for cars, trucks and SUVs
description: From the manufacturer Car Scents x 4 Palms x 6 Vent Sticks x 6 Charcoal Bags x 6 Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 8,752 4.0 out of 5 stars 460 3.6 out of 5 stars 78 2.1 out of 5 stars 7 Price — no data £5.96 £ 5 . 96 — no data — no data Features California Scents Car Scents deliver a great fragrance to your vehicle. The scent control cap provides as much or as little fragrance as you prefer. The canisters are ideal for all weather types and withstand high temperatures and humidity very well. California Scents Palms provide a strong and intense scent anywhere you want it. The super cute, palm-tree shaped scented paper, evokes images of California and is fun to have hanging around., whether it's in the car, at home or in the office. California Scents Vent Sticks provide an easy-to-use approach to adding incomparable scents to your car. Simply insert the sticks into your vent and enjoy the bold fragrance. California Scents Charcoal Pouches help clear the air and let you breathe in the freshness. Each activated charcoal pouch contains odour elimination technology that naturally purifies the air of smoke, food and pet odours that can take over your car.
